coverageNote: Broad but not exhaustive. Designed for LawSphere/MIZAN issue spotting, retrieval grounding, workflow guidance, draft routing, evidence checklists, and case-agent outputs.
disclaimer: Starter knowledge only. Not legal advice. This file is not a complete or authoritative statement of Pakistan law. Always verify against the latest Pakistan Code, provincial code portals, Gazette notifications, regulator circulars, rules, amendments, and qualified counsel before relying on any legal position.

acts.title: Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973
acts.summary: Supreme legal framework defining state organs, fundamental rights, constitutional remedies, and state structure.

acts.title: Pakistan Penal Code, 1860
acts.summary: Primary substantive criminal law defining offences and punishments.
issueSpotting: Is FIR or private complaint route relevant?

acts.title: Code of Criminal Procedure, 1898
acts.summary: Criminal procedure framework for complaints, investigation, arrest, bail, trial process, and magistrate/court procedure.
issueSpotting: Is FIR or private complaint route relevant?

acts.title: Code of Civil Procedure, 1908
acts.summary: Primary civil procedure framework for institution of suits, pleadings, summons, interim orders, decrees, execution, and appeals.

acts.title: Contract Act, 1872
acts.summary: Core contract framework for offer, acceptance, consideration, competent parties, free consent, lawful object, performance, breach, indemnity, guarantee, and agency.

acts.title: Specific Relief Act, 1877
acts.summary: Relevant where the requested remedy is a specific court order such as performance, injunction, declaration, cancellation, or correction.

acts.title: Limitation Act, 1908
acts.summary: Important for assessing whether a legal action, appeal, or claim may be time-barred.

acts.title: Qanun-e-Shahadat Order, 1984
acts.summary: Core evidence framework relevant for admissibility, relevance, proof of documents, witness testimony, expert evidence, and evidentiary value of records.

acts.title: Commercial Documents Evidence Act, 1939
acts.summary: Evidence-related law useful for commercial-document and business-record proof contexts.

acts.title: Electronic Transactions Ordinance, 2002
acts.summary: Relevant for electronic records, digital communications, and electronic transaction recognition.
issueSpotting: Can origin and integrity be shown?

acts.title: Prevention of Electronic Crimes Act, 2016
acts.summary: Primary cybercrime statute for unauthorized digital acts, cyber offences, and complaint-routing context.
issueSpotting: Can origin and integrity be shown?

acts.title: Defamation Ordinance, 2002
acts.summary: Relevant where false published statements are alleged to have harmed reputation, including digital publication contexts.
issueSpotting: Can origin and integrity be shown?

acts.title: Right of Access to Information Act, 2017
acts.summary: Framework for requesting access to information from public bodies.

acts.title: Arbitration Act, 1940
acts.summary: Relevant where a contract contains an arbitration clause or parties have agreed to arbitrate.

acts.title: Recognition and Enforcement (Arbitration Agreement and Foreign Arbitral) Act, 2011
acts.summary: Relevant for recognition and enforcement of foreign arbitral agreements and awards.

acts.title: Sale of Goods Act, 1930
acts.summary: Relevant for sale of goods contracts, delivery, payment, acceptance, rejection, and goods-related disputes.

acts.title: Partnership Act, 1932
acts.summary: Relevant to business partnerships, partner rights/obligations, firm liabilities, authority, accounting, and dissolution.

acts.title: Companies Act, 2017
acts.summary: Primary company law framework for corporate formation, management, directors, shareholders, filings, records, and governance.

acts.title: Securities Act, 2015
acts.summary: Capital-market framework relevant for securities offerings, market conduct, intermediaries, and investor protection.

acts.title: Securities and Exchange Commission of Pakistan Act, 1997
acts.summary: Regulatory context for corporate and securities supervision.

acts.title: Negotiable Instruments Act, 1881
acts.summary: Relevant for negotiable instruments such as cheques, promissory notes, bills of exchange, and dishonour/payment contexts.

acts.title: Financial Institutions (Recovery of Finances) Ordinance, 2001
acts.summary: Relevant to financial institution recovery suits and banking finance disputes involving borrowers, guarantors, security, and recovery proceedings.

acts.title: Financial Institutions (Secured Transactions) Act, 2016
acts.summary: Relevant where movable assets or receivables are used as collateral in secured financing transactions.

acts.title: State Bank of Pakistan Act, 1956
acts.summary: Establishes central bank regulatory context useful for banking complaint and regulated-finance routing.

acts.title: Banking Companies Ordinance, 1962
acts.summary: Banking-law context for banks and banking business, useful in bank-customer and account disputes.

acts.title: Income Tax Ordinance, 2001
acts.summary: Core income tax framework useful for tax notices, business verification, and evidence in commercial/employment disputes.

acts.title: Sales Tax Act, 1990
acts.summary: Sales tax framework relevant for business invoices, registered persons, refund/assessment notices, and commercial evidence.

acts.title: Stamp Act, 1899
acts.summary: Relevant for stamp duty on instruments and document-use issues, subject to provincial amendments.

acts.title: Transfer of Property Act, 1882
acts.summary: Property-law framework for transfers of property, sale, mortgage, lease, exchange, gift, and related interests.

acts.title: Registration Act, 1908
acts.summary: Relevant for registration of instruments, especially property-related documents, subject to provincial registration practice.

acts.title: Land Acquisition Act, 1894
acts.summary: Framework historically used for compulsory land acquisition and compensation issues, with provincial amendments and newer regimes to verify.

acts.title: Partition Act, 1893
acts.summary: Relevant where co-owners seek partition, sale, or division of jointly held property.

acts.title: Powers-of-Attorney Act, 1882
acts.summary: Relevant where a person acts through an attorney/agent under a power of attorney.

acts.title: Succession Act, 1925
acts.summary: Relevant for succession certificates, probate/letters of administration, debts/securities, and estate representation issues.

acts.title: Guardians and Wards Act, 1890
acts.summary: Relevant to guardianship and welfare of minors, usually interfacing with family courts.

acts.title: The Family Courts Act, 1964
acts.summary: Procedural framework for family court matters; local amendments and rules should be verified.

acts.title: Muslim Family Laws Ordinance, 1961
acts.summary: Important Muslim family-law framework in marriage/divorce procedural contexts and family documentation.

acts.title: Dissolution of Muslim Marriages Act, 1939
acts.summary: Relevant for dissolution of Muslim marriages and grounds/process themes.

acts.title: Dowry and Bridal Gifts (Restriction) Act, 1976
acts.summary: Relevant where disputes involve dowry, bridal gifts, marriage-related articles, and related claims.

acts.title: Protection Against Harassment of Women at the Workplace Act, 2010
acts.summary: Relevant for workplace harassment complaints, inquiry structure, and escalation to competent forums/ombudsperson.

acts.title: Payment of Wages Act, 1936
acts.summary: Supports issue spotting for wage timing, unauthorized deductions, and delayed wage disputes.

acts.title: Industrial Relations Act, 2012
acts.summary: Relevant to industrial relations, collective bargaining, and certain labour dispute frameworks.

acts.title: Factories Act, 1934
acts.summary: Factory labour framework for working conditions, safety, welfare, hours, and industrial establishment compliance.

acts.title: Workmen's Compensation Act, 1923 / Employees Compensation Context
acts.summary: Relevant to workplace injury/death compensation contexts, subject to provincial adaptations/current nomenclature.

acts.title: Shops and Establishments Legal Context
acts.summary: Provincial shops and establishments laws/rules often govern retail/commercial establishment employment conditions.

acts.title: Punjab Rented Premises Act, 2009
acts.summary: Punjab tenancy framework regulating landlord-tenant relationships, tenancy agreements, rent-related obligations, and dispute procedure.

acts.title: Islamabad Rent Restriction Ordinance, 2001
acts.summary: ICT rent framework for Islamabad-linked tenancy matters.

acts.title: Punjab Consumer Protection Act, 2005
acts.summary: Punjab consumer framework for consumer rights, defective products/services, unfair practices, and complaint redress.

acts.title: Sindh Consumer Protection Act, 2014
acts.summary: Sindh consumer protection framework providing complaint redress for consumers in Sindh.

acts.title: Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Consumer Protection Act, 1997
acts.summary: KP consumer protection context referenced by KP commercial and sectoral laws, with consumer courts playing a forum role.

acts.title: Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Resolution of Commercial Disputes Act, 2022
acts.summary: KP framework for commercial dispute resolution and commercial courts.

acts.title: Punjab Protection of Women Against Violence Act, 2016
acts.summary: Punjab framework for protection of women against violence and support/protection mechanisms.

acts.title: Anti-Money Laundering Act, 2010
acts.summary: Framework for anti-money laundering compliance, offences, and suspicious financial transaction contexts.

acts.title: Prevention of Trafficking in Persons Act, 2018
acts.summary: Relevant for serious trafficking, exploitation, forced labour, or related conduct.
issueSpotting: Is FIR or private complaint route relevant?

acts.title: Prevention of Smuggling of Migrants Act, 2018
acts.summary: Relevant where facts suggest facilitation of illegal migration, exploitation, travel fraud, or organized migrant smuggling.
issueSpotting: Is FIR or private complaint route relevant?

acts.title: Anti-Terrorism Act, 1997
acts.summary: Serious criminal statute for terrorism-related offences and special procedures. Use only for high-risk flagging.
issueSpotting: Is FIR or private complaint route relevant?

acts.title: Pakistan Environmental Protection Act, 1997
acts.summary: Environmental protection framework for pollution, environmental quality, EIA/IEE, and complaint contexts.

acts.title: Legal Practitioners and Bar Councils Act, 1973
acts.summary: Regulatory framework for legal practitioners and bar councils; useful for lawyer-profile verification and professional-conduct context.

acts.title: Civil Servants Act, 1973
acts.summary: Relevant for federal civil servant employment/service matters, including appointment, terms, disciplinary context, and service rights.

acts.title: Service Tribunals Act, 1973
acts.summary: Service tribunal framework for certain civil/service disputes after departmental orders/remedies.

acts.title: Notaries Ordinance, 1961
acts.summary: Relevant for notarization and notarial acts in legal documentation workflows.

acts.title: Oaths Act, 1873
acts.summary: Relevant to oath/affirmation formalities in court or affidavit contexts.

acts.title: Suits Valuation Act, 1887
acts.summary: Relevant to valuation of suits for jurisdiction and court-fee contexts, with provincial adaptations.

acts.title: Court Fees Act, 1870
acts.summary: Relevant for court fee assessment on suits, appeals, and applications; schedules may vary by province/forum.

acts.title: Small Claims and Minor Offences Courts Ordinance, 2002
acts.summary: Framework intended for small claims/minor offences contexts where available and operational in relevant jurisdiction.

acts.title: Societies Registration Act, 1860
acts.summary: Relevant for registered societies, associations, governance documents, member disputes, and registration records.

acts.title: Foreign Exchange Regulation Context
acts.summary: Foreign exchange and currency-account issues often involve SBP/FBR/regulatory context and current circulars.

acts.title: Legal Notice Workflow Context
acts.summary: Practical pre-litigation workflow used across contract, tenancy, employment, consumer, defamation, and payment disputes.

acts.title: Lawyer Handoff Workflow Context
acts.summary: Workflow for converting messy client material into a concise, lawyer-ready brief before proposal or consultation.

acts.title: Privacy and Redaction Workflow Context
acts.summary: Workflow context for safely sharing legal documents by masking sensitive identifiers while preserving legal meaning.

agencies.name: FIA Complaint Portal

agencies.name: National Cyber Crime Investigation Agency
agencies.notes: Relevant for cyber complaint direction; verify current operational portal and jurisdiction.

agencies.name: Securities and Exchange Commission of Pakistan
agencies.notes: Useful for company registration/status and corporate compliance context.

agencies.name: Federal Board of Revenue
agencies.notes: Useful for tax records and notices; specialist tax counsel may be required.

agencies.name: State Bank of Pakistan
agencies.notes: Useful for banking regulator context and escalation routes.

agencies.name: Federal/Provincial Ombudsperson for Harassment
agencies.notes: Forum depends on jurisdiction and workplace context.

agencies.name: Provincial Consumer Forums / Consumer Courts
agencies.notes: Consumer forum depends on province and statutory regime.

agencies.name: Labour Courts and Labour Authorities
agencies.notes: Forum depends on worker status, sector, employer, and province.

agencies.name: Family Courts
agencies.notes: Sensitive matters require careful privacy and safety handling.

agencies.name: NADRA
agencies.notes: Often relevant for evidence documents, not a dispute forum.

caseTypeProfiles.label: Cyber Complaint
recommendedRoadmap: route to FIA/NCCIA or lawyer for serious threats

aiSafetyRules: Do not present AI output as final legal advice.
Always recommend qualified lawyer review for serious, urgent, high-value, criminal, harassment, family, property, tax, banking, or court-facing matters.
When facts are missing, state uncertainty clearly.
Do not invent statutory sections unless they are available in retrieved source text.
Use legal act titles as context anchors, not as guaranteed final conclusions.
For provincial laws, ask for province/city before forum-specific guidance.
For limitation/deadline issues, flag urgency and advise verification against the exact claim type.
Separate AI-generated analysis from lawyer-verified content.
Never encourage evidence alteration, fabrication, or deletion.
